# Fixture source

These HTML fixtures (and the matching `tests/expected/` `.md` / `.html` files) were vendored from the upstream [Defuddle](https://github.com/kepano/defuddle) project (MIT licensed) at commit `fff0b9da87bbc0704866f060e48af00fe3dddfc4`. They form the corpus that drives Trek's parity-with-Defuddle integration suite (`tests/fixtures_test.rs`). To regenerate: clone `github.com/kepano/defuddle` at the same (or a newer) commit, then `cp tests/fixtures/*.html` and `cp tests/expected/*.{md,html}` from that checkout into the matching directories here, preserving filenames. After updating, re-run `TREK_UPDATE_FIXTURES=1 cargo test --test fixtures_test --features markdown-fixtures` to refresh expected outputs against current Trek behavior, then commit the result alongside this note.
